name: @zntc/web
description: ZNTC web platform — dev server + HMR overlay + postcss/sass pipeline + dev controller
author: ohah

scripts.build:bundle: node ../core/bin/zntc.mjs --bundle src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --format=esm --target=node --conditions=source --external @zntc/core --external postcss --external postcss-load-config --external sass
scripts.build: bun run build:bundle && bun run build:dts
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bunx publint --strict --level error .
